product_overview: AI-native CRM for insurance agents that centralizes client records, policy management and document workflows with schema-driven required documents and automated alerts. Provides a fast Next.js UI for agents to view KPIs, manage clients/products, assign policies and handle documents with clear renewal notifications.
core_goals: Provide a single-pane dashboard with actionable KPIs and alerts to prioritize agent work.
Enable fast creation and full 360 management of clients and their policies.
Enforce product-defined document requirements and make missing documents visible and actionable.
Automate renewal and payment-vulnerability alerts with suggested communications for agents.
Limit per-organization users to the licensed maximum (3) and integrate onboarding with Insforge.
Deliver polished, responsive UX with interactive file upload, toasts and modal/drawer patterns.

features.name: Dashboard
features.description: Landing overview that surfaces KPIs, urgent alerts (vencimientos, documentos faltantes) and quick actions to navigate into client or policy detail.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> View KPIs -> See 'Attention Required' alerts list -> Click an alert -> Navigate to /clients/[id] -> See client 360
Navigate to / -> View KPIs -> See toast 'Failed to load KPIs' -> Click Retry -> View KPIs

features.name: Client CRUD
features.description: Create, search, view and edit client records and provide a 360 profile page with contact info, policies and timeline.
user_flows: Navigate to /clients -> Click New Client -> Navigate to /clients/new -> Fill full_name field -> Fill email field -> Fill phone field -> Click Create client -> See success toast -> Navigate to /clients -> Use Search client 'Juan Perez' -> See client in list -> Click client -> Navigate to /clients/[id] -> See client 360 view
Navigate to /clients/new -> Fill email field with invalid format -> Click Create client -> See validation error 'Invalid email' -> Correct email field -> Click Create client -> See success toast

features.name: Product Management (Catalog)
features.description: Admin-facing product catalog to create and edit insurance product templates including JSON schema of required documents.
user_flows: Navigate to /products -> Click New Product -> Navigate to /products/new -> Fill name field -> Fill description field -> Define required_docs_schema field -> Click Create -> See product listed on /products
Navigate to /products/new -> Leave name field empty -> Click Create -> See validation error 'Name required' -> Fill name field -> Click Create -> See product listed on /products

features.name: Policy Assignment & Document Management
features.description: Assign products (policies) to clients, automatically generate client document entries from product schemas, and manage uploads and verification of required files.
user_flows: Navigate to /clients -> Click client -> Navigate to /clients/[id] -> Click Assign Policy -> Navigate to /clients/[id]/products/new -> Select product from catalog -> Click Assign policy -> See client_product created -> System creates client_documents records with status 'missing' -> Navigate to /clients/[id]/documents -> See list of missing documents -> Click Upload -> Upload document file -> See document item with status 'uploaded' -> Click Verify -> See document status 'verified'
Navigate to /clients/[id]/documents -> Click Upload -> Upload file larger than allowed -> See error toast 'Upload failed' -> Click Retry -> Upload valid file -> See document status 'uploaded'

features.name: File Upload UX (Interactive File Tree)
features.description: Interactive drag-and-drop file uploader with progress and clear document status states for the client's file tree/expediente.
user_flows: Navigate to /clients/[id]/documents -> Click Upload -> Drag-and-drop file -> See upload progress bar -> See file appear in document list with status 'uploaded'
Navigate to /clients/[id]/documents -> Click Upload -> Drag-and-drop unsupported file type -> See validation error 'Unsupported file type' -> Remove file -> Upload supported file -> See file uploaded

features.name: Notifications & Renewals
features.description: Visual semaphores and toast alerts for upcoming payment/vigency statuses with IA-generated renewal messages that agents can send in one click.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> View KPIs -> See payment semaforo statuses for policies (Green/Orange/Red) -> Click a policy in Renewals Queue -> See prefilled renewal message -> Click Send -> See toast 'Renewal sent'
Navigate to / -> View KPIs -> Click a suggested renewal -> Click Send -> See error toast 'Failed to send' -> Click Retry -> See toast 'Renewal sent'

features.name: Authentication, Organization Onboarding & License Limit
features.description: Onboarding via Insforge with organization creation, role assignment (org:admin/org:member) and enforcement of the 3-user license limit per organization.
user_flows: Register via Insforge as organization owner -> System creates organization and assigns org:admin role -> Navigate to /settings -> See organization and user list -> Invite team member -> Invite accepted -> See new user in /settings list
Navigate to /settings -> Click Invite user -> Fill email field -> Click Send invitation -> See error 'User limit reached' when attempting to invite a 4th user

features.name: Settings & System Configuration
features.description: Central place for organization-level settings, product and user management and license controls.
user_flows: Navigate to /settings -> View organization details -> Update organization name -> Click Save -> See success toast 'Settings saved'
Navigate to /settings -> Attempt to change role for user without permission -> See error 'Insufficient permissions' -> Contact org admin

tech_stack.ui_library: Tailwind CSS, Lucide React, Framer Motion, Sonner (Toasts)

routes.description: Form to register a new client.
